cases.question: Найти топ-5 локаций по количеству брокерских договоров за 2025 год. Вывести локацию, количество брокерских договоров, самую раннюю и самую позднюю дату открытия договора среди них.
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT
  ba.location,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ba.agreement_id) AS agreement_count,
  MIN(ba.open_dt) AS min_open_dt,
  MAX(ba.open_dt) AS max_open_dt
FROM dm_mis.v_d_broker_agmt ba
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM ba.report_date)::int = 2025
GROUP BY ba.location
ORDER BY agreement_count DESC, ba.location
LIMIT 5;
cases.predicted_sql:

  location,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS agreement_count,
  MIN(open_dt) AS earliest_open_dt,
  MAX(open_dt) AS latest_open_dt
FROM v_d_broker_agmt
WHERE open_dt >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND open_dt < DATE '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY location
ORDER BY agreement_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

cases.question: Проанализируйте портфель кредитных договоров по группам риска РВП за 2025-11-01. Для каждой группы риска выведите код группы риска, количество активных договоров, общую сумму начисленных процентов, среднюю сумму процентов на договор и максимальную дату открытия договора в группе.
cases.gold_sql:

  risk_group_rvp,
  COUNT(*) AS active_contract_count,
  SUM(interest_balance_out) AS total_interest_balance_out,
  COALESCE(AVG(CAST(interest_balance_out AS numeric(20, 2))), 0) AS avg_interest_per_contract,
  MAX(start_date) AS max_start_date
FROM dm_mis.v_f_contract
WHERE report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND risk_group_rvp IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY risk_group_rvp
ORDER BY total_interest_balance_out DESC;

cases.question: За дату '2025-11-01' выведи топ-5 договоров РКО с максимальным количеством связанных счетов. Покажите идентификатор договора, номер договора, дату открытия, тип договора и количество счетов.

  rc.agreement_id,
  rc.agreement_nbr,
  rc.open_date,
  rc.dog_type,
  COUNT(rca.account_id) AS count_accounts
FROM dm_mis.rko_contracts rc
JOIN dm_mis.rko_contracts_accounts rca
  ON rc.agreement_id = rca.agreement_id
  AND rc.report_date = rca.report_date
WHERE rc.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND rca.date_from <= rc.report_date
  AND rca.date_to >= rc.report_date
GROUP BY rc.agreement_id, rc.agreement_nbr, rc.open_date, rc.dog_type
ORDER BY count_accounts DESC, rc.agreement_id
LIMIT 5;

  rc.agreement_id,
  rc.agreement_nbr,
  rc.open_date,
  rc.dog_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rca.account_id) AS account_count

JOIN rko_contracts_accounts rca
  ON rc.agreement_id = rca.agreement_id
  AND rc.report_date = rca.report_date

cases.question: За дату '2025-11-01' выведите уникальное количество счетов в договорах РКО для каждого филиала, сгруппированную по типу продукта. Покажите код филиала, регион, наименование продукта, тип договора и уникальное количество счетов. Ограничьте вывод 5 первыми записями.

  AND rca.date_from <= rc.report_date
  AND rca.date_to >= rc.report_date
WHERE rc.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'

ORDER BY rc.branch_code, rc.product_nm
LIMIT 5;

cases.question: За дату '2025-11-01' проанализируйте роли счетов в договорах РКО. Выведите 5 самых распространенных ролей счетов, указав код роли, ее наименование, тип договора, продукт и количество договоров, использующих эту роль.

SELECT
  rca.account_role_code,
  rca.account_role_name,
  rc.dog_type,
  rc.product_nm,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rc.agreement_id) AS agreement_count
FROM dm_mis.rko_contracts_accounts rca
JOIN dm_mis.rko_contracts rc
  ON rca.agreement_id = rc.agreement_id
  AND rca.report_date = rc.report_date
WHERE rca.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND rca.date_from <= rca.report_date
  AND rca.date_to >= rca.report_date
GROUP BY rca.account_role_code, rca.account_role_name, rc.dog_type, rc.product_nm
ORDER BY agreement_count DESC, rca.account_role_code
LIMIT 5;
cases.predicted_sql:
SELECT
  a.account_role_code AS role_code,
  COALESCE(ar.long_name, a.account_role_name) AS role_name,
  c.dog_type AS contract_type,

cases.question: Для 5 самых популярных балансовых счетов 2-го порядка по количеству закрытых лицевых счетов до 2026-01-01 вывести номер, название, наименование счета первого порядка, общее количество лицевых счетов и средний срок между открытием и закрытием.
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT
  s.sinaccount AS second_level_account,
  s.name AS account_name,
  s.name_0 AS first_level_account_name,
  COUNT(a.account_id) AS total_accounts,
  AVG(a.close_dt - a.open_dt) AS avg_lifetime_days
FROM dm_mis.v_d_account a
JOIN dm_mis.vsinaccount s
  ON a.balance_account_id = s.id
WHERE a.close_dt < DATE '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY s.sinaccount, s.name, s.name_0
ORDER BY total_accounts DESC
LIMIT 5;

FROM vaccount a
JOIN v_d_account da
  ON da.account_id = a.id
JOIN vsinaccount sa
  ON sa.id = da.balance_account_id
WHERE a.closedate IS NOT NULL
  AND a.closedate < DATE '2026-01-01')
SELECT

FROM closed_accounts
GROUP BY bal_acct_2lvl_nbr, account_nm, sinaccount, sinaccount_name
ORDER BY closed_accounts_cnt DESC
LIMIT 5;

cases.question: Найти 5 счетов с наибольшим суммарным оборотом, сумма всех операций по дебету плюс по кредиту в рублевом эквиваленте, за 2025 год. Для каждого счета вывести номер, наименование, код валюты счета, общий оборот, количество операций и дату открытия счета.
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT
  a.account_nbr,
  a.account_nm,
  a.crcy_iso_alpha_cd,
  SUM(CASE
  WHEN t.db_account_id = a.account_id THEN t.amount_eqv
  WHEN t.cr_account_id = a.account_id THEN t.amount_eqv
  ELSE 0 END) AS turn_eqv, COUNT(t.acct_trns_id) AS operation_count, a.open_dt
FROM dm_mis.v_d_account a
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_acc_transaction t
  ON a.account_id = t.db_account_id
  OR a.account_id = t.cr_account_id
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM t.transaction_dt)::int = 2025
GROUP BY a.account_nbr, a.account_nm, a.crcy_iso_alpha_cd, a.open_dt
ORDER BY turn_eqv DESC
LIMIT 5;
cases.predicted_sql:
WITH acct_ops AS (SELECT account_id, SUM(amount_eqv) AS total_turnover, COUNT(*) AS operation_cnt
FROM (SELECT db_account_id AS account_id, amount_eqv
FROM v_f_acc_transaction
WHERE transaction_dt >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND transaction_dt < DATE '2026-01-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  cr_account_id AS account_id,
  amount_eqv
FROM v_f_acc_transaction
WHERE transaction_dt >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND transaction_dt < DATE '2026-01-01') t
GROUP BY account_id)
SELECT
  a.account_nbr,
  a.account_nm,
  a.currency_id,
  x.total_turnover,
  x.operation_cnt,
  a.open_dt
FROM acct_ops x
JOIN v_d_account a
  ON a.account_id = x.account_id
ORDER BY x.total_turnover DESC
LIMIT 5;

JOIN dm_mis.v_department_pc_fed dpf
  ON basn.dep_core_id = dpf.department_core_id

cases.question: Выведите топ-5 брокерских договоров с максимальным периодом действия одного тарифа в днях за 2025-11-01. Для каждого договора покажите номер договора, тариф, дату начала и окончания, длительность периода.
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT
  ba.agreement_nbr AS agreement_number,
  bta.tariff,
  bta.begin_date,
  bta.end_date,
  bta.end_date - bta.begin_date AS duration_days
FROM dm_mis.v_d_broker_agmt ba
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_broker_agmt_tariff_asn bta
  ON ba.agreement_id = bta.agreement_id
  AND ba.report_date = bta.report_date
WHERE ba.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
ORDER BY duration_days DESC, ba.agreement_nbr
LIMIT 5;
cases.predicted_sql:
WITH tariff_periods AS (SELECT d.agreement_nbr, a.tariff, a.begin_date, a.end_date, (a.end_date - a.begin_date + 1) AS duration_days, MAX(a.end_date - a.begin_date + 1) OVER (PARTITION BY a.agreement_id) AS max_duration_days
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_tariff_asn a
JOIN v_d_broker_agmt d
  ON d.agreement_id = a.agreement_id
WHERE a.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'), top_agreements AS (SELECT DISTINCT agreement_nbr, max_duration_days
FROM tariff_periods
ORDER BY max_duration_days DESC, agreement_nbr
LIMIT 5)
SELECT
  tp.agreement_nbr AS agreement_nbr,
  tp.tariff,
  tp.begin_date,
  tp.end_date,
  tp.duration_days
FROM tariff_periods tp
JOIN top_agreements ta
  ON ta.agreement_nbr = tp.agreement_nbr

cases.question: Проанализируйте динамику ставок для кредитных договоров, у которых в течение последних 30 дней до 2025-11-01 изменилась базовая ставка. Для каждой группы риска выведите название группы риска, количество договоров, среднюю предыдущую маржу, среднюю текущую маржу и среднюю разницу ставок.
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT
  c.risk_group,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.agreement_abs_id) AS agreement_count,
  AVG(r.previos_margin) AS avg_previous_margin,
  AVG(r.margin) AS avg_current_margin,
  AVG(r.percent_rate - r.previos_percent_rate) AS avg_rate_change
FROM dm_mis.v_f_contract c
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_contract_rate_ref r
  ON c.report_date = r.report_date
  AND c.agreement_id = r.agreement_id
WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND r.date_base_rate >= DATE '2025-11-01' - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY c.risk_group
ORDER BY agreement_count DESC;
cases.predicted_sql:
WITH changed AS (SELECT base_rate_name, agreement_id, margin AS current_margin, previos_margin AS previous_margin, margin - previos_margin AS rate_diff
FROM v_f_contract_rate_ref
WHERE report_date BETWEEN DATE '2025-10-02'
  AND DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND previos_percent_rate IS NOT NULL
  AND base_rate IS DISTINCT
FROM previos_percent_rate)
SELECT
  base_rate_name AS risk_group_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS contract_count,
  AVG(previous_margin) AS avg_previous_margin,
  AVG(current_margin) AS avg_current_margin,
  AVG(rate_diff) AS avg_rate_diff
FROM changed
GROUP BY base_rate_name;

cases.question: Найти все актуальные остатки по счетам для сделок РЕПО, которые были заключены в текущем году на текущую отчетную дату. Вывести дату отчета, номер сделки, тип РЕПО, валюту и остаток.

SELECT
  rest.balance_date,
  deal.deal_security_nbr AS repo_number,
  deal.type_repo,
  rest.volume_element,
  rest.balance_out,
  deal.settle_cur_id AS currency
FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal
  ON rest.leg1_deal_security_id = deal.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND rest.balance_date = deal.balance_date
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn
  ON rest.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND rest.account_id = asn.account_id
  AND rest.balance_date = asn.balance_date
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM deal.trade_dt)::int = EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int
  AND rest.balance_date = DATE '2026-05-04'
  AND deal.type_repo IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY deal.deal_security_nbr;

FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest)

FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest r

cases.question: Сделай выборку номеров сделок, типа РЕПО и роли счета по сделкам, исполненным в прошлом месяце. Отфильтровать записи так, чтобы остаток был актуален на дату жизни сделки, результат отсортировать по номеру сделки и роли счета.

  AND deal.leg1_exec_dt < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date

cases.question: Показать для каждого договора, закрытого в прошлом месяце, общий ненулевой остаток по всем счетам.
cases.gold_sql:
SELECT
  contract.agreement_nbr AS contract_number,
  SUM(rest.balance_out) AS total_nonzero_balance
FROM dm_mis.v_d_repo_contract contract
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal
  ON contract.agreement_id = deal.agreement_id
  AND contract.balance_date = deal.balance_date
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_asn asn
  ON deal.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND deal.balance_date = asn.balance_date
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest rest
  ON asn.leg1_deal_security_id = rest.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND asn.account_id = rest.account_id
  AND asn.balance_date = rest.balance_date
WHERE contract.fact_close_dt >= (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month')::date
  AND contract.fact_close_dt < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date
  AND rest.balance_date = contract.fact_close_dt
  AND rest.balance_out <> 0
GROUP BY contract.agreement_nbr
HAVING SUM(rest.balance_out) <> 0
ORDER BY total_nonzero_balance DESC;

WITH rate_changes AS (SELECT leg1_deal_security_id, balance_date, rate, open_dt, LAG(rate) OVER (PARTITION BY leg1_deal_security_id
ORDER BY open_dt) AS prev_rate
FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_rate
WHERE balance_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'), balance_changes AS (SELECT leg1_deal_security_id, balance_date, balance_out, LAG(balance_out) OVER (PARTITION BY leg1_deal_security_id
ORDER BY balance_date) AS prev_balance
FROM dm_mis.v_f_repo_acc_rest

  deal.deal_security_nbr AS deal_number,
  contract.agreement_nbr AS contract_number,
  deal.type_repo AS repo_type,
  CAST(((rc.rate - rc.prev_rate) * 100.0 / rc.prev_rate) AS numeric(10, 2)) AS rate_change_percent,
  CAST(AVG(ABS(bc.balance_out - bc.prev_balance)) AS numeric(15, 2)) AS avg_balance_change
FROM rate_changes rc
JOIN dm_mis.v_f_repo_deal deal
  ON rc.leg1_deal_security_id = deal.leg1_deal_security_id
JOIN dm_mis.v_d_repo_contract contract
  ON deal.agreement_id = contract.agreement_id
  AND deal.balance_date = contract.balance_date

WHERE rc.prev_rate IS NOT NULL

GROUP BY deal.deal_security_nbr, contract.agreement_nbr, deal.type_repo, rc.rate, rc.prev_rate

dm_mis_51.question: Проанализируйте динамику ставок для кредитных договоров, у которых в течение последних 30 дней до 2025-11-01 изменилась базовая ставка. WITH repo_contract_balances AS (SELECT c.agreement_id, MAX(r.balance_date) AS balance_date, SUM(c.agreement_account_rest) AS total_rest
FROM v_f_contract_od c
JOIN v_f_repo_deal r
  ON r.agreement_id = c.agreement_id
GROUP BY c.agreement_id), ranked AS (SELECT agreement_id, balance_date, total_rest, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_rest DESC) AS contract_rank
FROM repo_contract_balances)
SELECT
  agreement_id,
  balance_date,
  total_rest,
  contract_rank
FROM ranked
ORDER BY total_rest DESC, agreement_id
LIMIT 10;
